ncs_standard_definition.description_short: An Aqua-culturist/Fishery Officer is responsible for the cultivation of aquatic plants and animals, and the management of fisheries resources. They work to ensure sustainable and responsible practices in the industry.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: Aqua-culturists/Fishery Officers are involved in various activities such as fish farming, hatchery management, fish processing, and fisheries research. They work to promote the development of the aquaculture industry, while also ensuring the conservation of aquatic resources and the protection of the environment.

first_stepper.description: Standard route for a high school student.
target_degrees: B.Sc in Fisheries Science or related field

choice_maker.description: Has a generic degree, needs a bridge.

future_builder.description: Already in the sector, looking to advance.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 2 years of experience as a Junior Fisheries Officer

problem_solver_uturn.description: Switching from an unrelated field. No degree required.

roadmap.title: Capstone & Portfolio
topics: Develop a Fish Farming Business Plan
Create a Marketing Strategy for Aquaculture Products
